description_long: This object is a municipal pumping station assembly, featuring a prominent blue central valve body flanked by two large rust-red metal pipes. The pipes are supported by vertical posts and are anchored to a concrete base, with the lower sections wrapped in protective material. Two large handwheel valves are mounted on top, connected by a metal chain and a red lockout tag for security. The setup includes various smaller fittings and a pressure gauge, all designed for water flow control in urban infrastructure. The surrounding ground is covered with soil and concrete, and a green utility cover is visible nearby.
description: A robust urban pumping station with blue and rust-red pipes, handwheel valves, and a concrete base, secured with a chain and lockout tag.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue valve body, two large handwheel valves, red lockout tag, and full pipe assembly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the alignment of the pipes and handwheels, with less visibility of the blue valve body.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the blue valve, handwheels, and pipe supports from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pipe's end and the green utility cover, with the handwheels in profile.
attribute_building_signage: Red lockout tag with white text attached to the chain between the handwheel valves; text is not fully legible.
attribute_access_hatches: One green rectangular utility cover on the ground near the right pipe, likely metal or composite.
